# Sample Brief — Coffee Subscription Marketing Site

Build a marketing site for a coffee subscription startup. The product is a monthly subscription delivering single-origin coffee from sustainability-certified farms. The site has three pages: home (hero, value props, social proof, CTA), pricing (three subscription tiers + FAQ), and blog (post list + post detail).

Brand is sustainability-focused: warm earthy palette, editorial typography, photography of farmers and beans. The audience is design-aware specialty-coffee drinkers in North America who care about provenance.

No auth needed. No user accounts on the marketing site. Subscribe button links out to a checkout flow handled by Shopify (already exists). Email signup uses Resend. Analytics via Plausible.
